reviews.review_description:
What a wasted educational opportunity we have here. This app has SO much teaching potential, but sadly falls way, way short of what it could have taught.
The graphics are really good and there is so much potential here, doing this in VR.
But the dissection itself lacks detail and consists of opening the body then removing the free floating vital organs with forceps. No incision or cuts needed or any explanation given as to how you would separate and remove any of the organs at all. A missed teaching opportunity.

We started homeschooling due to Covid, but have found it so wonderful, we plan to continue. 
This app is just incredible for HS. Could I teach a dissection lab to my kids? Possibly…but this lab is next level amazing. My kids love it, they can’t wait to do more - I just facilitate their access to knowledge at this point. The teacher is clear, detailed and superb. Great graphics. My daughter actually gasped in delight!
I am so pleased with this!
